zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Waller於1434年出生在英國賀福爾布拉可麥時，她的父親Sir Richard Waller, Sheriff of Kent40歲，母親Margaret Waller Gulby26歲。她於1434年與Sir John Guildford在英國肯特斯培爾度爾斯特結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1461年在英國英格蘭肯特斯培爾度爾斯特享年27歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特斯培爾度爾斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Waller于1434年出生在英国賀福爾布拉可麥时，她的父亲Sir Richard Waller, Sheriff of Kent40岁，母亲Margaret Waller Gulby26岁。她于1434年与Sir John Guildford在英国肯特斯培爾度爾斯特结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1461年在英国英格兰肯特斯培爾度爾斯特享年27岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特斯培爾度爾斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Waller
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English waler, waliere, walour, waller ‘builder of walls, mason’.
English: in Sussex, perhaps a topographic name for someone who lived by a prominent wall.

English: topographic name for someone who lived by a spring, stream, or man-made well, from Middle English waller, a derivative of Middle English walle, Old English wælle, wælle. It is a West Midlands dialect form of Weller .

variants.name: Weller
meanings: English (Surrey, Sussex, and Kent): topographic name for someone who lived by a spring, stream, or man-made well, from Middle English weller, willer, an agent derivative of Middle English welle (in southern England) and wille (in south western England), from Old English wella, well(e), wiella, wielle, willa, wyll(a), wylle. This type of name, a topographic term + -er, is particularly typical of Sussex and its neigbouring counties.
English: occupational name for someone who casts metal or who boils salt, from Middle English weller, willer, a derivative with -er of Old English wellan, wiellan ‘to boil’. Compare 5 below.
North German: variant of   Welle  , cognate with 1 above.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Waller was born in 1434, in Blakemere, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir Richard Waller, Sheriff of Kent, was 40 and her mother, Margaret Waller Gulby, was 26. She married Sir John Guildford in 1434, in Speldhurst, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died in 1461, in Speldhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 27, and was buried in Speldhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Waller est née en 1434, à Blakemere, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Richard Waller, Sheriff of Kent, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Margaret Waller Gulby, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Guildford en 1434, à Speldhurst, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée en 1461, à Speldhurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 27 ans, et a été enterrée à Speldhurst, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Waller 1434 in Blakemere, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Richard Waller, Sheriff of Kent 40 und ihre Mutter Margaret Waller Gulby 26. Sie hat 1434 in Speldhurst, Kent, England Sir John Guildford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb 1461 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Speldhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Speldhurst, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Waller è nata il nel 1434 nel Blakemere, Herefordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Richard Waller, Sheriff of Kent, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Margaret Waller Gulby, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Guildford nel 1434, nel Speldhurst, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì nel 1461, nel Speldhurst, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 27 anni, e fu sepolta a Speldhurst, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Wallerが1434年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアブラケメアで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Waller, Sheriff of Kentは40歳，母Margaret Waller Gulbyは26歳であった。1434年にイギリスケントスペルドハルストでSir John Guildfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1461年にイギリスイギリスケントスペルドハルストで27歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントスペルドハルストにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Waller(이)가 1434년 영국 허퍼드실르 블레이케머에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Waller, Sheriff of Kent(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Waller Gulby(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1434년 영국 켄트 스펠드후르스트에서 Sir John Guildford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1461년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 스펠드후르스트에서 27세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 스펠드후르스트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Waller nasceu em 1434, em Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Richard Waller, Sheriff of Kent, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Waller Gulby, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Guildford em 1434, em Speldhurst, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1461, em Speldhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 27 anos, e foi sepultada em Speldhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Waller родилась в 1434 г. в местности блеикемир, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Waller, Sheriff of Kent было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Waller Gulby, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Guildford в 1434 г. в местности спелдхурст, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла в 1461 г. в местности спелдхурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 27 лет и была похоронена в местности спелдхурст, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Waller nació en 1434, en Blakemere, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Richard Waller, Sheriff of Kent, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Margaret Waller Gulby, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Sir John Guildford en 1434, en Speldhurst, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió en 1461, en Speldhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 27 años, y fue sepultada en Speldhurst, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
